# Choosing a City

## Introduction

The package template described throughout this guide is designed for cities that use the Socrata Open Data Platform. Because Socrata provides a standardized API across portals, the same package architecture can be reused with only a handful of city-specific modifications.

This chapter lists major U.S. cities with Socrata-based Open Data portals and provides the two most important values needed when creating a new package:

- the Socrata portal domain
- the metadata catalog dataset used by `city_list_datasets()`

::: callout-tip
## Using this table

Each row contains the two values needed to begin creating a new package.

1.  **Portal Domain**

- Used by `.city_endpoint()` in `utils_request.R`.
- *For example*: https://data.sfgov.org/resource/

2.  **Metadata Dataset**

- Used as the `dataset_id` in `city_list_datasets()`.
- *For example*: y8fp-fbf5

The complete metadata endpoint would therefore be:

- https://data.sfgov.org/resource/y8fp-fbf5.json
:::

| City | Website | API Base Endpoint | Metadata Dataset UID | Metadata JSON Endpoint | Package Status |
|:-----------|:-----------|:-----------|:-----------|:-----------|:-----------|
| **New York City, NY** | <https://data.cityofnewyork.us> | `https://data.cityofnewyork.us/resource/` | `5tqd-u88y` | <https://data.cityofnewyork.us/resource/5tqd-u88y.json> | ✅ `nycOpenData` |
| **New York State, NY** | <https://data.ny.gov> | `https://data.ny.gov/resource/` | `ca8h-8gjq` | <https://data.ny.gov/resource/ca8h-8gjq.json> | ✅ `nysOpenData` |
| **Chicago, IL** | <https://data.cityofchicago.org> | `https://data.cityofchicago.org/resource/` | `rsxa-ify5` | <https://data.cityofchicago.org/resource/rsxa-ify5.json> | ✅ `chiOpenData` |
| **Los Angeles, CA** | <https://data.lacity.org> | `https://data.lacity.org/resource/` | `fmt9-hut6` | <https://data.lacity.org/resource/fmt9-hut6.json> | ✅ `laOpenData` |
| **San Francisco, CA** | <https://data.sfgov.org> | `https://data.sfgov.org/resource/` | `y8fp-fbf5` | <https://data.sfgov.org/resource/y8fp-fbf5.json> | ⬜ Available |
| **Seattle, WA** | <https://data.seattle.gov> | `https://data.seattle.gov/resource/` | `phjv-68rp` | <https://data.seattle.gov/resource/phjv-68rp.json> | ⬜ Available |
| **Austin, TX** | <https://data.austintexas.gov> | `https://data.austintexas.gov/resource/` | `my8q-n4hf` | <https://data.austintexas.gov/resource/my8q-n4hf.json> | 🚧 `ausOpenData` (In Progress) |
| **Dallas, TX** | <https://data.dallascityhall.com> | `https://data.dallascityhall.com/resource/` | `7h2m-4a3j` | <https://data.dallascityhall.com/resource/7h2m-4a3j.json> | ⬜ Available |
| **New Orleans, LA** | <https://data.nola.gov> | `https://data.nola.gov/resource/` | `dhg4-3vbu` | <https://data.nola.gov/resource/dhg4-3vbu.json> | ⬜ Available |
| **Detroit, MI** | <https://data.detroitmi.gov> | `https://data.detroitmi.gov/resource/` | `pacb-jr36` | <https://data.detroitmi.gov/resource/pacb-jr36.json> | ⬜ Available |
| **Cincinnati, OH** | <https://data.cincinnati-oh.gov> | `https://data.cincinnati-oh.gov/resource/` | `a56y-rtyz` | <https://data.cincinnati-oh.gov/resource/a56y-rtyz.json> | ⬜ Available |

::: callout-note
## Finding additional cities

New Socrata portals are created and updated over time.

If your city is not listed here, search for its Open Data portal and determine whether it is powered by Socrata. If so, identify:

- the portal domain
- the metadata catalog dataset

Those two values are all that is required to begin adapting the package template.
:::

## Before You Begin

Before starting a new package, verify that:

- [ ] The city uses a Socrata-powered Open Data portal.
- [ ] The metadata catalog dataset is publicly accessible.
- [ ] Dataset JSON endpoints follow the standard `/resource/<uid>.json` format.
- [ ] API requests do not require authentication for the datasets you intend to use.
